creator: leon+freebsd@darkk.net.ru
text:
Created attachment 256136
pf (tests): Set cleared time when zeroing stats for table addresses

Hi Kristof,

I see that the patch (as well as the one for bug #282877) landed in stable/14, thanks for that.

Also the corresponding kernel fix (https://reviews.freebsd.org/D47697) is missing from stable/14 to the best of my understanding.

So I'm attaching the patch with the test-case you requested in D47697.
